headline: 3 Semiconductor Stocks We Find Risky
summary: Semiconductors are the picks and shovels of modern technology. The way we live and work is also changing with AI, which is creating secular demand for more powerful chips. As a result, the industry has seen solid stock price performance over the last six months as its gain of 125% has outpaced the S&P 500’s 8.9% return.

headline: Strength Seen in NXP (NXPI): Can Its 5.1% Jump Turn into More Strength?
summary: NXP (NXPI) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.
